Hey Joneisha, great job completing the orientation! Before you can start picking up Circle K shifts, you need to complete a quick background check. Open the Shiftsmart app and tap "Start Background Check" on your home screen — it takes about 5 minutes. Once it clears, you'll be able to see and grab shifts near you.
